## Checklist

- [ ] There is an issue and this PR links it
- [ ] Folder and file names follow CONTRIBUTING section 2
- [ ] Frontmatter present, no extra fields
- [ ] No em dashes
- [ ] Opinion is only in `My Take`, and disagreement from the thread is reported there rather than dropped
- [ ] Anything unverified is in `Unresolved`, not smoothed into a confident sentence
- [ ] Hub `Open Threads` collects the unresolved items from the talk notes
- [ ] New jargon has a glossary note and the wikilinks resolve
- [ ] Everyone who contributed is credited
